name: Banana Molasses Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the bananas until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg and mix well.
3. Beat in the sugar, molasses, and melted shortening until very smooth.
4. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Fold the dry mixture into the liquid ingredients until just combined.
6. Spoon the batter into a greased muffin tin.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until done.
8. Serve warm.
